name: package_id
description: CKAN package UUID. Parent dataset of the resource. NULLABLE during the package_id backfill window; tightened to REQUIRED once coverage on load_status='loaded' rows reaches 100%.

name: gcs_uri
description: Full gs:// URI of the stored body. NULL for rows without bytes (none today; reserved for future).

name: checksum
description: sha256 hex of the body bytes.

name: file_format
description: Canonical lowercase format from the magic-byte sniff. Mutable: the rows loader rewrites csv->tsv when the byte-level delimiter sniff disagrees.

name: declared_format
description: Format string as CKAN declared it. Kept verbatim for audit.

name: language
description: 'en' | 'fr' | 'unknown'. Single value; 2.2's detect_language() collapses CKAN's language list.

name: subjects
description: CKAN subject list. Query axis (WHERE 'X' IN UNNEST(subjects)).

name: ingestion_status
description: 'success' | 'quarantined'. 'failed' rows are filtered at load (master M2 disclaimer, 3.2).

name: run_id
description: Ingest run_id - points back to the source JSONL.

name: preamble_rows
description: Rows above the detected header, stored as a JSON array of arrays. NULL until 3.3 processes the file. Master M2 §6 Q2.

name: header_confidence
description: 'single' | 'multi_row' | 'low'. NULL until 3.3 processes the file. Master M2 §4.2 rule 3, §6 Q10.

name: load_status
description: 'pending' | 'loaded' | 'skipped_non_csv' | 'blob_missing' | 'parse_failed' | 'header_unparseable'. Set on every load attempt. Master M2 §5.1.

name: load_attempted_at
description: Last time 3.3 attempted to load this doc into raw.rows. NULL until first attempt.

name: load_error
description: One-line error message on non-'loaded' load_status. NULL when loaded successfully.

name: row_count
description: Number of body rows landed in raw.rows. NULL until loaded.
